flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Rice University rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.1k → $7.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rice University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.9k → $64.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rice University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.9k → $64.1k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Rice University are 68% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($89.7k vs $53.4k).
